description_long: This object represents an adult male pedestrian with exaggerated, elongated limbs and angular body proportions. The figure has a stylized beard and short hair, and is dressed in a long-sleeve shirt and pants, with visible sneakers. The arms and legs are unnaturally stretched, giving the figure a surreal, almost abstract appearance. The clothing appears casual, suitable for everyday urban environments, and the shoes are typical of streetwear. The overall form is highly distorted, with sharp angles and non-anatomical bends, making the figure appear as if it is in motion or being pulled in different directions.
description: A stylized adult male pedestrian with elongated limbs, casual clothing, and sneakers, featuring a surreal, angular body shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bearded face, outstretched arms, and sharply bent legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme length of the arms and the angular bend of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the shirt, and the unusual leg positioning.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the stretched limbs and the profile of the face.
attribute_posture: unnaturally stretched and angular, as if in mid-motion
attribute_hairstyle: short hair with a full beard
